classification_info.threshold_note: Veracity score > 0.5 = plausible (not fake). Alignment score > 0.5 = aligned.
classification_info.optimization_available: See threshold_analysis/ subdirectory for optimized thresholds

confusion_matrix.name: False Positive (Legitimate Flagged as Misinformation)
confusion_matrix.description: Legitimate content incorrectly flagged as misinformation

confusion_matrix.name: True Negative (Correctly Identified Legitimate)
confusion_matrix.description: Legitimate content correctly identified as legitimate

confusion_matrix.name: False Negative (Missed Misinformation)
confusion_matrix.description: Misinformation incorrectly marked as legitimate (missed detection)

alignment_mapping.partially_aligns: Partially Aligned (0.6) - Image relates but doesn't support
